q.en: What is the capital and largest city of Argentina?
q.zh: 阿根廷的首都和最大城市是哪里？

options.en: Córdoba according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 科尔多瓦（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book states: 'The capital and largest city in Argentina is Buenos Aires.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：“阿根廷的首都和最大城市是布宜诺斯艾利斯。”

q.en: Argentina is the second-largest country in South America and the ____ largest in the world.
q.zh: 阿根廷是南美洲第二大国，也是世界第几大国？

options.en: Third according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 第三（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says: 'Argentina is the second-largest country in South America and the eighth-largest country in the world.'
explain.zh: 书中说：“阿根廷是南美洲第二大国，也是世界第八大国。”

q.zh: 在词汇表中，“provinces（省份）”是什么？

options.en: The largest areas that some countries are divided into
options.zh: 某些国家划分出的最大区域

options.en: Small villages according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 小村庄（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The glossary defines provinces as 'the largest areas that some countries are divided into (p. 4).' The book notes Argentina has 23 provinces.
explain.zh: 词汇表把 provinces 定义为“某些国家划分出的最大区域（第4页）”。书中提到阿根廷有23个省。

options.en: A kind of food according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一种食物（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The glossary defines gaucho as 'a cowboy of the South American grassy plains (p. 12).'
explain.zh: 词汇表把 gaucho 定义为“南美草原上的牛仔（第12页）”。

q.en: Iguazú Falls are considered one of the ____ in the world.
q.zh: 伊瓜苏瀑布被认为是世界上的什么之一？

options.en: Tallest buildings according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 最高的建筑（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says: 'Iguazú Falls are one of the seven natural wonders of the world.'
explain.zh: 书中说：“伊瓜苏瀑布是世界七大自然奇观之一。”

q.en: What does the book say about the Andes Mountains?
q.zh: 关于安第斯山脉，书中说了什么？

options.en: They are the shortest river according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它们是最短的河流（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: They are the longest mountain chain in the world
options.zh: 它们是世界上最长的山脉

explain.en: The book states the Andes 'is the longest mountain chain in the world' at about 7,242 km long.
explain.zh: 书中说安第斯山脉“是世界上最长的山脉”，长约7,242千米。

q.en: What tea do many Argentines drink because they say it gives them energy?
q.zh: 许多阿根廷人喝哪种茶，并称它能给人能量？

options.en: Coffee according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 咖啡（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says: 'Many people in Argentina drink a tea called yerba maté. They say it gives them energy.'
explain.zh: 书中说：“许多阿根廷人喝一种叫马黛茶的茶。他们说它能给人能量。”

q.en: Why does the book call Argentina a 'melting pot'?
q.zh: 为什么书中称阿根廷是“大熔炉”？

options.en: Many different peoples came together to form the nation
options.zh: 许多不同民族汇聚在一起组成了这个国家

options.en: It is a very hot country according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它是一个很热的国家（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book explains: 'People call Argentina a "melting pot." This is because many different kinds of people came together to form a new nation.'
explain.zh: 书中解释：“人们称阿根廷为‘大熔炉’，这是因为许多不同民族汇聚在一起组成了一个新国家。”

q.en: In what year was Juan Perón elected president of Argentina?
q.zh: 胡安·庇隆是在哪一年当选阿根廷总统的？

options.en: 1973 according to some versions of the story

explain.en: The book says: 'In 1946, the people elected Juan Perón president.'
explain.zh: 书中说：“1946年，人民选举胡安·庇隆为总统。”

q.en: What is the primary language of Argentina?
q.zh: 阿根廷的主要语言是什么？

explain.en: The 'Conclusion' fact box lists 'Primary Language: Spanish.'
explain.zh: “结语”信息框列出“主要语言：西班牙语”。

prompt.en: Create a travel poster or diary page for a pretend trip to Argentina, including at least three real places or facts from the book (e.g., Iguazú Falls, gauchos, Buenos Aires).
prompt.zh: 制作一张旅行海报或游记页，假装去阿根廷旅行，包含书中至少三个真实的地点或事实（如伊瓜苏瀑布、高乔人、布宜诺斯艾利斯）。

en: Use the 'Where Is It?' and 'Land' sections for real geography facts.
Mention a celebration or food from the book to make it vivid.
zh: 利用“在哪里？”和“土地”两节获取真实的地理事实。
提及书中一个节日或食物，让海报更生动。
